channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: Database branches: Neon vs PlanetScale locally
item.description: Cut local branch spin-up time 50% with PlanetScale and Neon CLI flags — delays, errors, and the exact commands that fixed them in 2026.

item.title: Design multi-region systems without 3× the cost
item.description: Cut global infra bill 40% using regional Redis + Cloudflare Workers — cache hit ratios, secret rotation, and the surprise write latency win nobody mentions.

item.title: Debug AI agent failures differently
item.description: Cut AI agent incident detection time from days to hours with agent behavior traces. Structured logs miss hallucinations and prompt drift; traces catch them. Benchmark shows 200x faster detection — see the setup.

item.title: HTMX: 5 things I dropped to make it work
item.description: Cut frontend build time 95% and memory 60% by swapping React for HTMX — the exact changes teams made in 2026 and what they gave up to get there.

item.title: Tool calling patterns: patterns that survive load vs
item.description: Cut API response time 60% and AWS costs 83% with safety-first tool calls — retry budgets, backoff curves, and the circuit breaker mistake most teams miss.

item.title: AI debt trap: LLM code vs human code in prod
item.description: Cut production incidents 50% by choosing between LLM code and human code in 2026. Learn the exact metrics, tool versions, and guardrails that separate safe AI adoption from hidden technical debt.

item.title: Survive 90s DB failover without melting
item.description: Cut failover downtime to 0.3 s with SQLite client-side buffering — the real patterns teams use to keep systems up when databases crash in 2026.

item.title: Migrate to Daraja 2.0 now — what broke and how to fix
item.description: Cut M-Pesa integration failures 91% with Daraja 2.0 migration checklist, endpoint changes, timestamp format fixes, and idempotent keys. 180 ms latency after switch.

item.title: Platform teams in 2026: Docs vs. production reality
item.description: A 2025 survey of 1,200 platform engineers found that 63% of teams using Kubernetes in production still run clusters with misconfigured pod limits that…

item.title: Who owns AI-generated code?
item.description: Cut review time 51% with AI pair coding — the ownership model, security gates, and Bandit scan that dropped incidents 100%.

item.title: USSD menus: 2026 fintech survival guide
item.description: Cut USSD latency 40% with Redis caching and session recovery — Safaricom MTN error codes, Nokia 105 quirks, and the real telecom limits you must test in 2026.

item.title: Stop blaming passwords
item.description: Passkeys cut login bounce 71% and support tickets 75% in six weeks — Firebase Auth migration guide with code samples and latency benchmarks

item.title: AI fixes legacy code nobody owns
item.description: In one case, a Colombian fintech’s legacy batch processing system took 45 minutes to redeploy, with a 12% failure rate on production deployments.

item.title: RAG is not enough: hybrid search + reranking in 2026
item.description: Cut RAG hallucinations 40% with hybrid search + reranking in 2026 — BM25 first, CrossEncoder second, Mistral last — latency under 100 ms, cost under $0.004/query.

item.title: Portfolio that hires: 6 projects I actually used to
item.description: Portfolio projects that get hired in 2026: 3 real systems with latency, cost, and payment data. Built for 2G networks, offline-first, and local payment integrations on $5/month servers.

item.title: Stop async Python from freezing your stack
item.description: Cut async Python latency 268 ms and memory 260 MB by choosing trio over asyncio in 2026 — the benchmark, traps, and the one metric to check first.

item.title: AI interviews now want prompt budgets
item.description: Cut interview failure 25% with prompt hacking tests — token budgets, guardrail bypasses, and latency regression scripts that actually predict on-call performance.

item.title: Webhooks done right: 3 mistakes that cost us 12 hours
item.description: Cut duplicate webhook events from 14% to 0.03% with SQS FIFO and idempotency keys — the 2026 guide teams actually use in production

item.title: AI UI tools: 6 months in, what I gained and lost
item.description: Cut UI generation time 40% with AI tools — but only after fixing design tokens and adding visual regression tests. Real numbers, real bugs, and the workflow that works in 2026.

item.title: 6 micro-SaaS niches AI couldn't commoditise
item.description: Discover 6 micro-SaaS niches that survived AI commoditisation in 2026 — with revenue, churn, and moat data. Stop AI-washing your product and start building defensible moats.
